markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, resolve blockers, and review performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Image Blocker:** A miscommunication over AI-generated infographics halted all blog production. Carly is escalating this to resolve the blocker and unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - **Performance:** Vizcom ranks \#2 in non-branded search presence, just below Blender, a key win given the recent site relaunch.
  - [**New Tools:** Growth X is launching a proprietary tracking tool to replace Scrunch, offering more robust competitive analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Webflow Access:** Maura will grant Carly's team ("pod A") Webflow access, replacing Ada's seat, to ensure team-wide visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Blocker

  - [**Problem:** Blog production is stalled because required Open Graph (OG) images are not being created.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A miscommunication during the account transition.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [**Ada (Growth X) →** Notified Vizcom that the AI-generated infographics were at their technical limit.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Vizcom →** Interpreted this as a halt for infographics only, not for all visual assets (e.g., hero images, OG images).](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [**Result →** Growth X paused all visual work, blocking blog publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Carly will escalate this internally to resolve the blocker and restart image production.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### SEO & Technical Assets

  - [**Schema & Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Status:** Complete.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Action:** Vizcom to grant Carly shared drive access for delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [**Owner:** Kim (Vizcom) will implement.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**robots.txt Template:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [**Status:** Complete.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Action:** Carly to deliver via shared drive.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Note:** Vizcom must review and edit the template to ensure correct pages are disallowed (e.g., admin URLs) to preserve crawl budget.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Alt Tag Recommendations:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Status:** On hold, pending resolution of the image production blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### Performance & Tracking

  - [**Scrunch Data (Last 12 Weeks):**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - **Non-Branded Prompts:** Vizcom ranks \#2, just below Blender.
      - **Brand Presence:** Vizcom ranks \#2 for terms like "3D modeling" and "rendering."
  - [**New Proprietary Tracking Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Replaces Scrunch for more robust competitive analysis and historical data tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Status:** Vizcom is already added; Carly will present the tool in the coming weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [**Looker Studio:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [**Status:** Data is pulling correctly post-migration.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Note:** Accurate blog performance data is pending, as many posts were staged before the site relaunch.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Webflow Access

  - [**Action:** Maura will grant Webflow access to Carly's team ("pod A").](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Process:** Maura will remove Ada's seat and add "pod A." Carly's team can then add up to four guest users.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Upcoming Site Pages

  - [**University Page:** Launching Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Other Pages (No Dates):** Updates, Challenges, Design Advocate Program.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Resolve the image production blocker (EOD Jan 20 or Jan 21).](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Deliver schema/robots.txt templates to the shared drive.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Confirm ability to add guest users in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [**Maura:**](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Grant Carly shared drive access.](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Grant Webflow access to "pod A."](https://fathom.video/share/fqXMG5gy1R9pq73Ro9LrzrptnennNGju?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
